checks.detail: Response frontmatter matches the active data_analysis handoff and current context hash.
The response distinguishes official facts, template structure, data limitations, candidate metrics, and unresolved assumptions without selecting a model or fabricating numerical results.

The v4 template inspector reproduces the three official template structures: Q3 has 3 rows, Q4 has 3 rows, Q5 has 15 rows; all are single-sheet, unprotected, formula-free, and without hidden rows or columns.
IN05 and IN06 now preserve the PDF semantics and Q1-only scope: release at 1.5 s after task receipt and detonation 3.6 s after release.
Correlation EDA now requires two observed numeric columns and the v4 EDA entry point performs template structure inspection without invoking the removed v3 workflow controller.
Fresh evidence: 33 unit tests passed; stage artifact validation, gate check, contract validation, and whitespace diff check passed.
